task.policy_text: Choose the single best same-product candidate for the reference offer. Treat same-brand accessories, bundles, neighboring model numbers, and storage or color variants as confusers rather than true matches. Use only the minimal decisive attributes.

candidate_right_offers.title: HYDRO FLASK HYDRO FLASK 32OZ WIDE MOUTH BOTTLE-BLACK
candidate_right_offers.description: Big enough for a whole day on the river or trails, the Hydro Flask 32 oz Wide Mouth Bottle is made with professional-grade stainless steel and a wider opening for faster fill. The Color Last™ powder coat is dishwasher safe for even more convenience. Cold

candidate_right_offers.title: Canon CLI-251BK XL High-Capacity Black Ink Tank
candidate_right_offers.description: For the PIXMA iX6820, iP7220, iP8720, MG5420, MG5422, MG5520, MG5522, MG6320, MG6420, MG7120, MX722, and MX922 PrintersThe CLI-251BK XL High-Capacity Black Ink Tank from Canon is part of the ChromaLife100 system that guarantees print longevity of 300 years when used with select Canon paper and stored in an archival-quality photo album. The ink tank features an LED light which will illuminate when you install the ink tank correctly. Additionally, when a full set of Canon ink is installed, you can access content on Canon's Creative Park Premium website for free. The instant-drying ink is compatible with the following printers:PIXMA iX6820 PIXMA iP7220 PIXMA iP8720 PIXMA MG5420 PIXMA MG5422 PIXMA MG5520 PIXMA MG5522 PIXMA MG6320 PIXMA MG6420 PIXMA MG7120 PIXMA MX722 PIXMA MX922Ink Dries Instantly: Photos can be handled right out of the printer without getting smudgedSmart LED: Lets you know when the ink is properly installedChromaLife100 : Combines enhanced FINE print head technology with select Canon inks and select Canon photo papers for borderless photos that will last up to 300 years when stored in an archival-quality photo albumCreative Park Premium: After installing a full set of Canon ink you can download projects from the Creative Park Premium website including postcards, calendars, scrapbook pages, and paintings
